connectivity_graph.description: Top-down local connectivity graph. A/B share the orange start node; C is green.

A.encoding: uint16 PNG; z-depth in 0.25 mm units, divide by 4000 for meters; zero means no reading

B.encoding: uint16 PNG; z-depth in 0.25 mm units, divide by 4000 for meters; zero means no reading
